name: Spaghetti with Sausage and Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Smoked turkey sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 medium Sweet red peppers, thinly sliced
1 medium Onion, halved and thinly sliced
2 14.5 oz. can Diced tomatoes with juices
recipeInstructions:
In a Dutch oven, brown the sausage over medium heat. Add the peppers and onion; sauté for 2 minutes. Add the diced tomatoes with juices, garlic, hot pepper sauce, paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper to the pot. Cook and stir until the vegetables are tender.
Combine the chicken broth and cornstarch in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the sausage pot, stirring continuously. Bring the sauce to a boil.
Once boiling, reduce heat to low and cook until thickened. Add the cooked spaghetti to the sauce and continue cooking for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
